calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-09-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Change Venue To Santa Cruz County And Request For Attorney Fees
Off Calendar Jun-26-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs GUITARFISH MUSIC FESTIVAL, LLC, BRENT DANA, FREDERICK MAHLER, and BARNETT ENGLISH's Motion To Change Venue To Santa Cruz County And Request For Attorney Fees:

Defendants' motion to change venue to Santa Cruz County is GRANTED. When, as here, no special rule applies, venue is proper where any defendant resides. (CCP 395; Brown v. Sup. Ct. (1984) 37 Cal.3d 477, 482, n.6, ("when a plaintiff brings an action against several defendants, both individual and corporate, in a county in which none of the defendants reside, an individual defendant has the right to change venue to the county of his or her residence. This is true even though the action was initially brought in a county where the corporate defendants may be sued under Code of Civil Procedure section 395.5.").) This law applies when at least one cause of action supports change of venue. (Rosen v. Kessler (1956) 145 Cal.App.2d 676, 683.) I find no bad faith by plaintiff, as laws on this topic can be opaque, so the request for attorney fees and costs is denied.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard Ulmer, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
